infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NOWHERE uses your location to auto-play music when you arrive at saved places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NOWHERE uses your location in the background to auto-play music when you arrive at saved places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: NOWHERE uses your location in the background to auto-play music when you arrive at saved places.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NOWHERE uses your location to save places and recommend music for where you are right now.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: NOWHERE uses your location in the background to detect when you arrive at saved places and prepare auto-play.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: NOWHERE uses your location in the background to detect when you arrive at saved places and prepare auto-play.
